rulings.Case Title: TATIANA DINS VS. CARDENAS THREE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Rescheduled Motion And Motion For Order Awarding Attorneys Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 4, 2021 line 2. DEFENDANT PATRIOT CAPITAL ADVISORS, LLC's Notice Of Rescheduled Motion And Motion For Order Awarding Attorneys Fees And Costs is DENIED. Assuming that defendant is able to recover fees under the Note, Defendant failed to include any competent and admissible evidence as to the reasonableness of the hours spent on the activities in this action. While inclusion of the invoices is not mandatory, the declaration should have at least included the number of hours, the hourly rate and a general description of the tasks performed, e.g. demurrer - 10 hours; court appearances - 10 hours, etc. Inclusion of such minimally required most basic information (that was readily available to the moving party) with the reply is procedurally improper. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: BRENDA OLIVA ET AL VS. 3134 24TH STREET LLC, ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants' Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Expert Daniel Bornstein And Plaintiffs' Attorneys Of Record, Tenant Law Group And For Sanctions Against Tenant Law Group And Daniel Bornstein
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 4, 2021 line 3. DEFENDANTS 3134 24TH STREET LLC, HANNA AZAR and JERIES AZAR's Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Expert Daniel Bornstein And Plaintiffs' Attorneys Of Record, Tenant Law Group And For Sanctions Against Tenant Law Group And Daniel Bornstein is moot in part and GRANTED in part. Motion to Disqualify expert is moot. Motion to disqualify plaintiff's counsel is GRANTED. Shadow Traffic Network v. Superior Court (1994) 24 Cal.App.4th 1067. Request for sanctions is denied. The Court is inclined to vacate March 10, 2021 trial date in light of this ruling, unless parties are ready to proceed with trial. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303).
